# Auctra

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/introduction.md): An auction house that settles on Ethereum, exposed as a JSON API.
- [Quickstart](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/quickstart.md): From zero to a live auction on Sepolia in four steps.
- [Authentication](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/authentication.md): API keys, scopes, environments, and what to do when one leaks.
- [Environments](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/environments.md): Sandbox and production are the same code against different chains.
- [The signing model](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/signing-model.md): Why write endpoints return a transaction instead of doing the work.
- [Auction lifecycle](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/auction-lifecycle.md): Six states, one clock, and the two transitions nobody controls.
- [Errors](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/errors.md): One shape, stable codes, and a request id worth quoting.
- [Idempotency](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/idempotency.md): Retry a POST safely, even when you never saw the response.
- [Pagination](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/pagination.md): Cursors, not page numbers, and why that isn't pedantry.
- [Rate limits](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/rate-limits.md): 100 requests a minute, per key, and how to not need them.
- [Webhooks](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/webhooks.md): Signed, retried, replayable — and how to verify one before you trust it.
- [Guide: list an item](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/guide-list-an-item.md): Approve, create, confirm — the full seller flow, end to end.
- [Guide: place a bid](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/guide-place-a-bid.md): Read the minimum, prepare, sign, and handle being outbid.
- [Guide: settle and pay out](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/guide-settle.md): The clock runs out. Now someone has to close the loop.
- [API reference](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/api-reference.md): Every endpoint, parameter and response.
- [Changelog](https://auctra-api.vercel.app/changelog.md): Versions are dated. Breaking changes get a new one.
